name: BatchStartViewerSessionRevocationViewerSession
description: A viewer session to revoke in the call to BatchStartViewerSessionRevocation.

allOf.description: The ARN of the channel associated with the viewer session to revoke.
The ID of the viewer associated with the viewer session to revoke. Do not use this field for personally identifying, confidential, or sensitive information.
An optional filter on which versions of the viewer session to revoke. All versions less than or equal to the specified version will be revoked. Default: 0.
